footer.tagline: A simple system to manage enquiries, admissions, and students.

hero.label: Classes360
hero.title: Never miss an admission enquiry again.
hero.subtitleLine1: A simple system to manage admission enquiries.
hero.subtitleLine3: Manage students, courses, and fees in one place.

problem.title: Managing enquiries on WhatsApp, Excel, or notebooks?
problem.item1: Enquiries get lost in WhatsApp chats
problem.item2: Follow-ups are forgotten during busy admission periods
problem.item3: Student records are scattered across files
problem.item5: No clear view of admissions and students

solution.title: One simple system to manage admissions.
solution.item1: Capture enquiries from forms, QR codes, and links
solution.item2: Track every enquiry until the student joins
solution.item3: Keep all student records in one place
solution.item4: Track course fees and installment payments
solution.item5: Give students access to course details through a portal

featuresSection.title: Features built for coaching institutes
featuresSection.item1Description: Capture every enquiry and track follow-ups until admission.
featuresSection.item2Description: Create a simple page where students can view courses and send enquiries.
featuresSection.item3Description: Keep all student and course information organized in one place.
featuresSection.item4Description: Track course fees, installments, and payments easily.
featuresSection.item5Description: Students can check their courses, batches, and updates.
featuresSection.item6Description: Use dashboard alerts, email notifications, and optional WhatsApp automation for student communication.

useCasesSection.title: Used by different types of institutes
useCasesSection.item1Description: Track enquiries, admissions, and batches in one place.
useCasesSection.item2Description: Track daily enquiries, students, and fees without juggling spreadsheets.
useCasesSection.item3Description: Track course enquiries, students, and fee payments.
useCasesSection.item4Description: Manage admissions and students for short-term programs.

trust.title: Built for coaching institutes in India
trust.subtitle: Simple, practical, and reliable.
trust.item1: Early institutes already using Classes360 in Pune
trust.item3: Each institute has its own private workspace
trust.item4: Your institute always owns its data

demo.title: Institute Page Demo
demo.description: Each institute gets a simple page where students can view courses and send enquiries.

pricing.title: Simple pricing for coaching institutes.
pricing.description: Unlimited enquiries, students, courses, and follow-ups. Plans differ by team scale, collaboration depth, and branding control.
pricing.positioningLine: One admission easily covers the monthly cost.
pricing.unlimitedUsageLine: All plans include unlimited enquiries, students, courses, follow-ups, and notes.
pricing.unlimitedUsageHint: Unlimited usage is subject to fair use policy to ensure platform stability.
pricing.starterSubtext: For solo institute owners starting admissions management
pricing.teamSubtext: For small admission teams collaborating daily
pricing.scaleSubtext: For large institutes with multiple counselors and high volume
pricing.trialBadge: 14-day free trial. No credit card required.
pricing.grandfatheredLine: Existing customers keep their current pricing. Updated pricing applies to new customers.
pricing.whatsAppAlertsTooltip: Classes360 sends team alerts for enquiries and follow-ups, and you can optionally connect your own WhatsApp Business number for student messaging. Meta conversation charges are billed directly to the institute.
pricing.whatsAppAutoLine1: The system sends WhatsApp alerts automatically for operational workflows.
pricing.whatsAppAutoLine2: When you connect your own WhatsApp Business number, Meta conversation charges are billed directly to your institute.
pricing.whatsAppExtraLine: Meta conversation charges are billed directly to your institute.
pricing.coreSystemLine: All core features are available in every plan.
pricing.whatsAppSenderModesLine: WhatsApp alerts are included in every plan. You can connect your WhatsApp Business number for automated student notifications.
pricing.starterFeature1: Public institute page with enquiry form
pricing.starterFeature3: Capture enquiries from website, QR, and shared links
pricing.starterFeature8: WhatsApp alerts for institute staff with optional WhatsApp Business integration
pricing.starterOutcome: Run your entire admission process without hiring extra staff.
pricing.teamFeature6: Track who is handling each enquiry
pricing.teamOutcome: Bring your entire team into one structured admission workflow.
pricing.growthOutcome: Scale admissions without losing visibility or control.
pricing.scaleOutcome: Operate admissions like a full-fledged CRM system.
pricing.annualLine1: Switch to Yearly and pay only 10 months for full-year access.
pricing.annualLine2: Pay yearly to save two months.
pricing.trust9: WhatsApp alerts work with your own business number setup.
pricing.sectionRoi: How the system pays for itself
pricing.roiLine1: If your course fee is ₹30,000, one extra admission easily covers the ₹999 monthly cost.
pricing.roiLine2: Long-term model is stable, trustworthy, and scalable with no future pricing regret.
pricing.faq1Question: Can I upgrade my plan later?
pricing.faq1Answer: Yes. You can upgrade anytime from your account settings.
pricing.faq2Question: What happens if I exceed my user limit?
pricing.faq2Answer: Adding new users requires an upgrade. All existing operations continue uninterrupted.
pricing.faq3Answer: Yes. Every account includes a 14-day free trial. No credit card is required to start.
pricing.faq4Answer: Classes360 can send alerts to your team when enquiries or follow-ups occur. You can also connect your own WhatsApp Business number to automate messages to students. WhatsApp conversation charges are billed directly by Meta.
pricing.supportItem4: WhatsApp support during working hours (Mon–Sat, 10 AM – 7 PM)

faq.title: FAQ
faq.a1: Yes. You can start a free trial before choosing a paid plan.
faq.a2: Yes. You can cancel subscription from billing settings any time.
faq.a3: Yes. Payments are processed securely using Razorpay.
faq.a4: Each institute has its own secure workspace and login access.
faq.a5: Yes. Team plans support multiple users with separate access.
faq.q6: Do you handle student fee payments?
faq.a6: Yes. You can track fee collections and payment records inside Classes360. Student fee payments are recorded manually with payment method and reference.
